text: The counterparty, JP Morgan Chase Bank N.A. (LEI: 7H6GLXDRUGQFU57RNE97), acting as swap dealer, is a Category A ISDA Master Agreement counterparty with a credit rating of AA- (S&P).

All counterparties with a net exposure exceeding EUR 10 million, including Société Générale S.A. (EUR 14.2M), BBVA S.A. (EUR 11.8M), and Commerzbank AG (EUR 10.5M), require senior management approval.
The clearing counterparty for all EUR-denominated interest rate swaps is LCH Clearnet SA, a central counterparty clearing house (CCP) authorised under EMIR.
The reporting counterparty under EMIR is Deutsche Bank AG (LEI: 7LTWFZYICNSX8D621K86), and the other counterparty is a non-financial entity, Volkswagen AG (LEI: VGRQXHF3J8VDLUA7XE92).
The prime broker, Morgan Stanley & Co. International plc, provides custody, financing, and execution services to the hedge fund counterparty, Alcyone Capital Management LP.
